seriess.title: Large Bank Consumer Mortgage Originations: Average Interest Rate at Origination by LTV: 30-Year Fixed Rate Mortgage: >=80 Loan-to-Value
seriess.notes:
The average interest rate at origination for 30-year fixed rate mortgages with a borrower with a loan to value (LTV) ratio greater than or equal to 80 at the time of origination.

For more detail see the methodology (https://sc103-philfed-prod-cm.sitecore-prod-ase4.appserviceenvironment.net/surveys-and-data/y14-methodology).
